mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_CAB_URL' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownCabUrl", MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_CAB_URL_OUT' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownCabUrlOut", MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_SERVER_IP' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownServerIp", MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_SERVER_IP_OUT' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownOutServerIp", MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_SERVER_PORT' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownServerPort", MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_LANG_CODE' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownLangCode", MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_SECRET_KEY' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownSecretKey", MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_IS_SECURITY' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownIsSecurity", MAX(CASE WHEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_USER_AUTH' THEN SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE END) AS "updownUserAuth" FROM DOCS_SYSTEM_CONFIG WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD LIKE 'UPDOWN%'

SELECT FILE_PATH_NM AS filePathNm, ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm, ORG_FILE_NM AS fileNm, FILE_SIZE AS fileSize FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE
(OBJECT_ID = #{list.objectId} AND FILE_NO = #{list.fileNo})
